abilities.name: Enchanted Javelin
abilities.description: If this character deals Piercing Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +2. Whenever this character deals any Piercing Dmg it may deal the same amount of Magical Dmg instead.

abilities.name: Woodland Animal
abilities.description: This character may Jog over Wooded Patches and does not need to expend 1 energy during the Replenish Step if any part of its base is within a Wooded Patch.

abilities.name: Leshavit's Shield
abilities.description: If this character would suffer Dmg, you may reduce that Dmg to {Null}. Once per game.

abilities.name: Enchanted Bladestorm
abilities.description: This attack is not modified by Evade Stat or Cover and may only be used if this model has the Enchanted Javelin ability.

arcaneOutcomes.text: Target suffers X+1 Piercing Dmg. After resolving this action, this model loses Enchanted Javelin until end of turn.

This character may discard 2 energy. If it does, all other models within 4" of this model suffer X+1 Piercing Dmg then are moved X" directly away. After resolving this action, this model loses Enchanted Javelin until end of game.
If this character has the Enchanted Javelin ability, the targtet gains it and this model loses it, both until end of turn.
